title: Create wizard prompt utilities
description: Create src/cli/wizard.ts with readline-based prompt helpers suitable for unit testing.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN wizard tests use scripted input/output streams THEN prompt utilities read answers and close the readline interface; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:19
review_initial_requirements: Verify wizard uses Node built-in readline and no new heavy dependency.
review_regression_requirements: Run init tests and TypeScript build.

title: Implement provider selection
description: Implement wizard provider selection for DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Custom providers.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN user selects a provider THEN wizard records provider and default base URL/model for DeepSeek or OpenAI; WHEN custom is selected THEN custom base URL is requested; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:21
review_initial_requirements: Verify provider choices are normalized and invalid choices reprompt or default safely.
review_regression_requirements: Run init tests and TypeScript build.

title: Implement API key input redaction
description: Prompt for API key during init and ensure displayed summaries only show redacted key material.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN init wizard output is inspected THEN it never prints the full API key and summaries show only a redacted key marker; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:22
review_initial_requirements: Verify no full API key is written to stdout/stderr, test names, or notes.
review_regression_requirements: Run init tests and secret-shaped scan over source/tests/docs/issues.

title: Implement model and timeout prompts
description: Prompt for model and timeoutMs with provider-specific defaults and positive integer validation.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN model is blank THEN provider default model is used; WHEN timeout input is invalid THEN the wizard falls back to a positive default; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:23
review_initial_requirements: Verify timeout parsing accepts only positive integers.
review_regression_requirements: Run init tests and TypeScript build.

title: Implement custom base URL prompt
description: Prompt for base URL only when the custom provider path is selected.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN provider is custom THEN base URL prompt is required; WHEN provider is DeepSeek or OpenAI THEN default base URL is used without custom prompt; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:24
review_initial_requirements: Verify custom base URL is trimmed and empty values are rejected or defaulted safely.
review_regression_requirements: Run init tests and TypeScript build.

title: Write global configuration file
description: Persist wizard output to ~/.autob/config.json, creating the directory as needed.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN init completes THEN ~/.autob/config.json exists with llm provider, baseUrl, apiKey, model, and timeoutMs fields; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:25
review_initial_requirements: Verify file writes use injected home directories in tests and do not write secrets outside the requested global config.
review_regression_requirements: Run init/config tests and TypeScript build.

title: Implement optional connectivity check
description: Offer an optional post-write connectivity check using the configured LLM client without making it mandatory for init success.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN user declines connectivity check THEN init completes without network calls; WHEN user accepts and client succeeds THEN success is reported; WHEN check fails THEN config remains written and failure is reported without exposing apiKey; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:26
review_initial_requirements: Verify connectivity check can be injected/mocked and secret material is not printed on failure.
review_regression_requirements: Run init tests and TypeScript build.

title: Show merged config with source annotations
description: Implement config show behavior to expose merged config values and where each field came from.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN config show runs with global and project configs THEN output labels Global or Project for each field and redacts apiKey; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:27
review_initial_requirements: Verify source annotations are derived from actual loaded files and apiKey is redacted.
review_regression_requirements: Run config and CLI tests plus TypeScript build.

title: Wire init command to wizard flow
description: Connect autob init to the wizard implementation and expose path injection for tests.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN createProgram receives injected wizard dependencies THEN init command calls runInitWizard; WHEN built CLI help runs THEN init is available; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:9
review_initial_requirements: Verify production CLI uses process stdin/stdout and tests can inject streams/paths.
review_regression_requirements: Run CLI/init/package smoke tests and TypeScript build.
